# Koyon Injin da Dan Adam a Cikin Zagaye: An Fahimce Shi Kuskure

**Lazaros Toumanidis**

---

Wannan littafin jagora yana nazarin daya daga cikin mahimman yankuna — kuma mafi fahimtar kuskure — na fasahar wucin-gadi ta zamani: shigar da dan adam cikin zagayen koyo. Daga lakabi na bayanai da koyon aiki zuwa RLHF da koyo daga misalai, hukuncin dan adam yana da daraja marar misali.

Littafin yana nufin masu bincike, injiniyoyi, da dalibai wadanda suke son fahimtar lokacin, dalilin, da yadda dole ne dan adam ya shiga cikin zagayen koyo.

:::{admonition} Bugu na Hausa
:class: note
Wannan shi ne fassarar Hausa. Asalin turanci shi ne bugun farko na tunani. Wasu babi-babi na fasaha na iya zama har yanzu cikin ci gaba.
:::

---

## Tsarin Littafi

**Kashi na Farko — Tushe da Ginshiƙai** — yana kafa tsarin tunani na HITL ML da matakan sarrafa kai.

**Kashi na Biyu — Dabarun Asali** — yana rufe lakabi na bayanai, koyon aiki, da koyon injin mai mu'amala.

**Kashi na Uku — Koyo daga Ra'ayin Dan Adam** — yana rufe RLHF, koyo daga misalai da kwatancen.

**Kashi na Hudu — Aikace-aikace** — yana nazarin misalai na NLP, gane hoto ta kwamfuta, da lafiya.

**Kashi na Biyar — Tsarin Aiki da Aiwatarwa** — yana rufe kayan aiki, dandamali, da ma'aunai na tsarin HITL.

**Kashi na Shida — Da'a da Makomar Fasaha** — yana magana kan adalci, nuna bambanci, da makomar huldar dan adam da algorithm.
